hero.headline: Every Woman Deserves
hero.subheading: GalUP walks alongside incarcerated and formerly incarcerated women in Singapore — through meals, mentorship, health education, and the belief that every story deserves a new chapter. We can see this for sure on every way forwards now

about.heading: Walking Alongside Women Others Have Left Behind
about.p1: GalUP — Gals Up — was founded on a simple belief: that incarcerated and formerly incarcerated women deserve more than a system that forgets them the moment they leave.
about.p2: We show up — with meals, mentorship, health education, and vocational training — building genuine relationships that last far beyond prison walls. Because lasting change only happens when people feel truly seen.
about.p3: Today, GalUP runs seven community programs, partners with over 24 organisations, and is backed by a community of donors who believe in second chances.

visionmission.vision: A Singapore where every woman — regardless of her past — is truly seen, genuinely supported, and given the space to flourish. Where the measure of justice includes the healing it makes possible, not only the punishment it delivers.
visionmission.mission: To provide incarcerated and formerly incarcerated women in Singapore with holistic, sustained support — through nourishment, health, leadership, and skills — so that every woman has what she needs to write a new chapter on her own terms.
